title: Surveillance of botulism - Canada.ca
content:
## Surveillance of botulism
Learn about botulism surveillance.
- Number of cases of botulism in Canada
- How Canada monitors botulism

## Number of cases of botulism in Canada
Between 2012 and 2016, an average of 6 cases of botulism was reported annually.

## How Canada monitors botulism
Botulism is a nationally notifiable disease. Cases that meet the national case definition are reported through the Canadian Notifiable Disease Surveillance System .
